# installIntegration

> Adds a marketplace integration to an organization's solution as a tool

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| solutionId | string | yes |
| integrationId | string | yes |
| db | Database | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[integration: call findPartnerIntegrationById]
  A --> B[tool: call createSolutionTool]
  B --> C[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `SolutionTool`
